title: Hedging Bets
relevance_summary: Prediction market manipulation leading to oracle manipulation

prevention.rule: Block any tx that updates oracle data based on external prediction market outcomes.

red_flags: Oracle update triggered by external market data
Discrepancy between official results and prediction market outcomes
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ORACLE_UPDATE if EXTERNAL_MARKET_DATA is called within the same transaction
summary: A prediction market manipulated its own outcome, leading to an oracle update that contradicted official results. A guard could have blocked oracle updates triggered by external market data.
